title: Ancient Harvest
body:
Have you thought about how Sniffers should be able to dig up plants with actual _purpose?_ Maybe a new crop or something? Well worry no longer, because with this mod you can have your own **Ancient Harvest!**

When **Sniffers** dig into the ground, they have a chance up digging up an **Ancient Seed** which, when planted in **Farmland**, will over time grow into an **Ancient Fruit,** a large, pink, carrot-like _fruit!_*

When broken, the **Ancient Fruit** drops a few **Ancient Fruit Slices,** which have the same _hunger_ and _saturation_ as **Steak!****

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

_Picking these up_ will give you the **"Time to Carrot About History"** advancement!

</details>



But when surrouned by 8 **Golden Nuggets** in a **Crafting Table,** an **Ancient Fruit Slice** will turn into a **Golden Ancient Fruit Slice,** which has the same hunger and saturation as **Rabbit Stew!**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

_Crafting_ this will give you the **"An Ancient Delicacy"** advancement, and _eating_ it will give you the **"A Bite for the Ages"** advancement!

</details>



_Happy farming!_

*Techinically it would be a considered a _vegetable_, but who cares?

**Or "Cooked Beef" for you Bedrock enjoyers.
